// src/components/Intro.js
// Camera-lens intro animation: dark bg → circle expands → zooms through → hero reveals
import React,{useEffect,useRef,useState}from'react';import'./Intro.css';/**
 * IntroOverlay
 * Phase 0 (0–0.6s):  Dark screen fades in, circular lens appears with profile photo + text
 * Phase 1 (0.8–2.2s): Circle scales up (zoom through lens effect)
 * Phase 2 (2.2–3.2s): Dark overlay fades out revealing the hero beneath
 * Phase 3 (3.2s+):    Overlay unmounts, hero text fades in
 *
 * Props:
 *   onComplete: () => void   — called when overlay is done and should be removed
 */import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function IntroOverlay(_ref){let{onComplete}=_ref;const overlayRef=useRef(null);// phase: 'enter' | 'zoom' | 'fadeout' | 'done'
const[phase,setPhase]=useState('enter');useEffect(()=>{// Small initial delay so the page is rendered
const t0=setTimeout(()=>setPhase('zoom'),900);const t1=setTimeout(()=>setPhase('fadeout'),2400);const t2=setTimeout(()=>{setPhase('done');onComplete===null||onComplete===void 0?void 0:onComplete();},3600);return()=>{clearTimeout(t0);clearTimeout(t1);clearTimeout(t2);};},[onComplete]);if(phase==='done')return null;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{ref:overlayRef,className:`intro-overlay intro-overlay--${phase}`,"aria-hidden":"true",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"intro-dark"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`intro-lens intro-lens--${phase}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"intro-lens__inner",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"intro-lens__placeholder",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:"/assets/profile-pic.jpg",alt:"",className:"intro-lens__photo"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"intro-lens__ring intro-lens__ring--1"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"intro-lens__ring intro-lens__ring--2"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"intro-lens__bevel"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`intro-text intro-text--${phase}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"intro-text__tl",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"intro-eyebrow",children:"Hello, I'm"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h1",{className:"intro-name",children:["Albertus",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("em",{children:"Ivan"})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"intro-text__br",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"intro-tagline",children:"CS & Statistics \xB7 UBC"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"intro-tagline intro-tagline--sub",children:"Software Developer"})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`intro-scroll-hint intro-scroll-hint--${phase}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"scroll to explore"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"intro-scroll-line"})]})]});}
